text:
Created attachment 145929
patch for updating port

- Update from 0.60 to 0.84
- Add BUILD_DEPENDS
- Can take maintainership if this can be of help

Tested on FreeBSD-10.0-amd64 (log attached) with:
poudriere testport -j 10-amd64 -o devel/p5-Test-Base > p5-Test-Base.log
